zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Treherne於1448年出生在英國素福爾可梅廷加姆時，她的父親Avery Traherne25歲，母親Mawd Thomas31歲。她於1480年與Geoffrey Gooch在英國素福爾可梅廷加姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1498年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾紐藍德享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: Treherne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Treharne
meanings: Welsh (Glamorgan and Carmarthenshire): from the Welsh personal name Trahaearn, composed of the elements tra ‘most, very’ + haearn ‘iron’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Treherne was born in 1448, in Mettingham, Suffolk, England, her father, Avery Traherne, was 25 and her mother, Mawd Thomas, was 31. She married Geoffrey Gooch in 1480, in Mettingham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1498, in Newland, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Treherne est née en 1448, à Mettingham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Avery Traherne, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mawd Thomas, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Geoffrey Gooch en 1480, à Mettingham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1498, à Newland, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Treherne 1448 in Mettingham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Avery Traherne 25 und ihre Mutter Mawd Thomas 31. Sie hat 1480 in Mettingham, Suffolk, England Geoffrey Gooch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1498 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Newland, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.Ilketshall, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이케츠홀 스트 존

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Treherne(이)가 1448년 영국 수폴크 멧틴그함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Avery Traherne(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mawd Thomas(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1480년 영국 수폴크 멧틴그함에서 Geoffrey Gooch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1498년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 뉴랜드에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Geoffrey Gooch em 1480, em Mettingham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Treherne родилась в 1448 г. в местности меттингхам, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Avery Traherne было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mawd Thomas, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffrey Gooch в 1480 г. в местности меттингхам, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1498 г. в местности нюланд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.

Se casó con Geoffrey Gooch en 1480, en Mettingham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1498, en Newland, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años.
